title: BSP IDMAC descriptor field audit
observations: BSP descriptor setup writes CH, OWN, DIC, buffer size, shifted buffer address, shifted next-descriptor pointer, FD, LD, and wmb().
The local diagnostic branch writes the same relevant fields for the failing single-SG CMD18 transfer.
Prior runtime tests already covered shifted/unshifted DLBA and descriptor end-of-ring variants.
No untested descriptor field or address-format delta remains for the observed first-descriptor-fetch stall.
reason: The controller never consumes descriptor word 0, and the descriptor fields already match the BSP shape for this transfer.
next: Do not retest descriptor fields without new evidence; focus remains on SDMMC0 memory-master/fabric access.
